response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project work via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed data pipelines — key requirements for this role. His DLang and Node.js background shows systems-level aptitude, but the absence of proven expertise in routing tiling, real-time traffic integration, or production-grade geospatial data systems raises significant gaps.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Demonstrated systems-level programming with DLang and low-latency systems
Strong track record of learning new technologies and contributing across stacks
concerns: No demonstrated professional experience with C++ or Rust in production routing systems
Lacks evidence of working on navigation data pipelines, routing tiles, or map optimization
Minimal exposure to distributed systems concepts like fault tolerance or service discovery in resume
